title: stochastic 100% on jssm-util
manager: Close the stochastic-coverage gap on `jssm-util` so its utility functions are exercised by seeded random walks, not just a handful of hand-picked cases. Utilities are where quiet edge-case bugs like to live — an off-by-one in a helper that only fires on unusual input — so getting this to a clean 100% is part of starting the 6.0 suites from a proven-exercised base.
